title: NAUTILOS D5.1 - Report on "Novel multi-platform cooperative network integration"
author: Gessica Lanfranchi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The present document describes the common interface protocol for communications, according to standards – acoustic (underwater)/RF (surface) communication. 

 The underwater acoustic communications will be realised with modems from Aquatec, using the communications protocol developed during the DAMOCLES FP6 project.
steps_raw:
The present document describes the common interface protocol for communications, according to standards – acoustic (underwater)/RF (surface) communication. 

 The underwater acoustic communications will be realised with modems from Aquatec, using the communications protocol developed during the DAMOCLES FP6 project.
